questions.question: 1. Which of the following sphygmomanometers is visualized in the simulator window of the experiment?
2. Identify the parts of an aneroid sphygmomanometer

answers.a: Aneroid Gauge, Inflatable cuff, Inflation Bulb, Oximeter
answers.b: Aneroid Gauge, Mercury column, Inflatable cuff, Oximeter
answers.c: Aneroid Gauge, Inflatable cuff, Inflation Bulb, Stethoscope
answers.d: Aneroid Gauge, Mercury column, Inflatable cuff, Stethoscope

questions.question: 3. Which of the following arteries is considered for blood pressure (BP) measurement?
4. Korotkoff sounds are produced due to the

answers.a: Turbulent flow of blood through an artery
